visual_description: The scene opens with three men standing in a dimly lit tiled room: a man in a dark shirt on the left, a man in a shiny sequined jacket in the center, and an older man in a suit on the right, all appearing to converse. The view cuts to a close‑up of a computer monitor displaying an advanced scanning interface with options for SMS alerts and a list of phone numbers. The final shot shows a man wearing headphones in a dim setting, holding a camera up to his eye as he records.
